positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for premises_conclusion_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    is_podcast(family_secrets)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    is_novel(family_history)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~is_podcast(family_history)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~is_novel(X0) | ~is_podcast(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define born_in_person_city(X0,X1) := $false
for all inputs,
    define is_american_city(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_american(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define written_by(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_novel_writer(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define created_podcast(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
